---
pagetitle: "Martin Lukk"
description: "Social scientist studying politics, inequality, and digital platforms."
page-layout: custom
listing:
  - id: news-recent
    contents: news/*.qmd
    exclude:
      filename: "index.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: _templates/news-item.ejs
    max-items: 4
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [date, title]
    page-size: 4
---

# About

I am a social scientist studying _politics, inequality, and digital platforms._ I am particularly interested in how AI evaluates deservingness and how cultural divisions become sources of political conflict.

I am an author of the book [*GoFailMe: The Unfulfilled Promise of Digital Crowdfunding*](book/) (Stanford University Press). I received my Ph.D. in sociology from the University of Toronto.

## News

::: {#news-recent}
:::

[See all News &rarr;](news/){.see-all}
